verses.text: Tawlkhat khit, mangbuh lak hunin a zi kiangah a hawh dingin keelno khat tawh Samson a pai hi. Amah in, “Inndei sung ka zi kiangah ka lum ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a sungpa in amah lutsak lo hi

A sungpa in, “Amah mudah taktak hi ni teh, ci-in ngaihsun ka hih manin na lawmpa' zi dingin ka pia hi. A naunu amah sangin hoihzaw hilo ahi hiam? A u tangin amah na ten'pihna dingin kong thum hi,” a ci hi
Samson in, “Tutungin amau tungah siatna ka bawlna-ah Filistia mite tawh kisai-in ka mawh kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samson pai-in ngia za thum manin meilah zong a la hi. Amah in a ngia meite khatlekhat kimatsakin a meite kikalah meilah khat ciat hencip hi
A meilahte a kuan'sak khit ciangin Filistia mite' ankung dinglaite lakah ngiate paisak a, anphualte leh ankung dinglaite, leh oliv lote kangtum hi

Tua ciangin Filistia mite in, “Kua in hih ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Timnah mite' makpa Samson in hih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a sungpa in a zi laksakin a lawmpa tungah piaksak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Filistia mite hong paito-in tuanu leh a pa mei tawh a hallum uh hi
Samson in amaute kiangah, “Hih pen, note' hih ahih leh, ka kiciam hi. Note kong thuk ding a, tua khit ciangin ka khawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah in amaute dawmloin tampi that a, tua ciangin paisukin Etam suanghawm sungah a om hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Samson in Lehi-ah Filistia mite Zo

verses.text: Tua ciangin Filistia mite paito-in Judah gamah giahphual sat uh a, Lehi sim uh hi
Judah mite in, “Bang hangin kote simin hong paito na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Samson a hen ding leh ko tungah amah in hong hih bangin ama tungah a hih dingin kong paito uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin Judah mite mihing tul thum Etam suanghawmah paisukin Samson kiangah, “Filistia mite, eite a hong ukte ahihlam theilo na hi hiam? Kote' tungah nang' hong bawl bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Samson in amaute kiangah, “Amaute in kei tungah hong bawl bangin amaute tungah ka bawl hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amaute in Samson kiangah, “Filistia mite' khutsungah nang kong piak theihna dingun nangmah a hen dingin kong paisuk uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Samson in amaute kiangah, “Note mahmah in nong thah lohna ding uh kei tungah hong kiciam un,” a ci hi

Amaute in Samson kiangah, “Kong that kei ding uh hi. Nang hong henin amaute' khutsungah kong pia bek ding uh a, nang kong that het kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khauhual thak nih tawh amah hen uh a, tua suanghawm sung panin amah pai khiatpihto uh hi

Lehi-ah Samson a tun' ciangin amah a dawn dingin Filistia mite hong pai-in awng uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tungah Topa' kha khauhtakin hong tung a, a khut tunga om khauhualte pen mei in a kat anthul khau tawh kibang a, amah a kikhihnate a khut panin tolhkhia hi
Tua ciangin amah in la khaguh thak khat mu a, a khut zanin tua khaguh la-in tua tawh mihing tul khat a that hi
Tua ciangin Samson in, “La khaguh khat tawh a lom lomin, la khaguh khat tawh mihing tul khat ka that hi,” a ci hi
Tua a thugen a man khit ciangin a la khaguh paaikhia hi; tua mun pen Ramathlehi kici hi
Tua ciangin amah dangtak mahmah ahih manin Topa samin, “Na nasempa' tha tawh hih bang suahtakna lian nong piazo hi. Tu-in dangtakin kei si-in dawibia mite' khutsungah puk ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Pasian in Lehi-a om komdep khat hong a, tua sung panin tui hong phul hi. Amah in tua tui a dawn ciangin a tha hong dimkikin thakhauh kik hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun min Enhakkore kici a, tuhun dongin Lehi-ah tua tuikhuk omlai hi
Amah in Filistia mite' uk hun sung Israel-te kum sawmnih sung thu a khen hi.
